methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs with a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, explicit ownership, and measurable key results.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe customer and business outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure meaningful movement on customer or business KPIs.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q1 Stabilize premium access foundations
companyObjectives.statement: Earlier quarter objective retained as historical context.

objectives.title: 2026-Q1 Premium foundations archived goal
objectives.objective: Stabilize premium access, billing, and edition entitlement flows after rapid subscriber growth.

keyResults.statement: Reduce premium access failures after rapid bundle and subscription growth.

executingTeams.intent: Improve entitlement reliability and premium access clarity.

supportingTeams.intent: Protect billing correctness and renewal integrity.
